meta.display_name: Coordinate Sensitive Role Transition Training for Lisa Anderson

task: Lisa Anderson is being reassigned from Onboarding to Talent Acquisition as a Recruiting Coordinator. David Thompson emailed HR upset about losing her mid-cycle — send him an empathetic acknowledgment email thanking him for his support during the handoff. Schedule a 30-minute transition planning meeting between David Thompson and Michael Chen this week. Before emailing Lisa her required training modules, check with Sarah Johnson via chat for the list of training modules Lisa needs to complete, and also confirm with Michael Chen via chat whether he has any additional onboarding requirements for Lisa's new role. Then email Lisa the complete combined list.

agent_profile_overrides.secret: I need Lisa to also complete the following before she starts: ATS Power User Certification and Candidate Experience Standards Training. These are in addition to whatever Sarah requires.

I've determined the training modules Lisa Anderson needs to complete before starting in Talent Acquisition. She must complete: Recruiting Compliance Fundamentals, Interviewing Best Practices, Diversity Sourcing Strategies, and Offer Letter Processing. Please make sure she gets this list.

seed_calendar_events.description: Weekly check-in on new hire onboarding progress

seed_emails.subject: Lisa Anderson's Reassignment — Seriously Frustrated
seed_emails.body_text:
Hi HR,

I just found out that Lisa Anderson is being moved to Talent Acquisition. Frankly, I'm blindsided by this. We're in the middle of onboarding a cohort of 12 new hires and Lisa is the linchpin holding the whole thing together. Pulling her out now is going to derail weeks of planning.

I feel like nobody consulted me or even gave me a heads-up. This is incredibly disrespectful to my team and the work we've been doing. I don't understand why these decisions get made without involving the people who are actually impacted.

I need to know what the plan is for covering her responsibilities. This can't just be dumped on the rest of us.

David Thompson

I feel like nobody consulted me or even gave me a heads-up. This is incredibly disrespectful to my team and the work we've been doing. I don't understand why these decisions get made without involving the people who are actually impacted.

I need to know what the plan is for covering her responsibilities. This can't just be dumped on the rest of us.

David Thompson
